raw_consumer_statement: Barclay American Airlines credit card : I was subject to an internet fraud for fake merchandise in XXXX of 2025. I reported this to Barclays that this was a fraud company online with a fake website and I never received the merchandise, with proof of the online scam. However they sent me a letter refusing my dispute claim saying they will only help with and investigate charges within the last 2 months! I called back and spoke to the customer service in XXXX Nevada who told me the charge was valid which is untrue because I never received the merchandise. A XXXX search of the company sluggers base lead me to a XXXX post of several XXXX other customers also being defrauded, but all of them had banks who refunded them.
